items.title: Bodø/Glimt møter for andre gong Inter i Meisterligaen – slik startar laga
items.description:

items.title: Prestianni trains at Bernabeu despite match ban over racism allegation
items.description: Benfica winger Gianluca Prestianni trained alongside his team-mates at Real Madrid's stadium on Wednesday, despite being provisionally banned for Wednesday's Champions League match between the sides.

items.title: Giacomel has heart surgery after Olympics withdrawal
items.description: Italian biathlete Tommaso Giacomel has minor heart surgery after dropping out when leading the Winter Olympic 15km mass start event last week.

items.title: Team GB's curlers discuss winning silver on BBC Breakfast
items.description: Team GB's silver medal-winning curling team could go for gold at the 2030 Winter Olympics in France but will "sit down in the summer" before making a decision.

items.title: Finland boikotter åpningsseremonien i Paralympics
items.description:
Finland vil ikke delta under åpningsseremonien i Paralympics i Milano Cortina 6. mars.

items.title: «Tom» Klæbo har snudd – går verdenscup i Falun til helgen
